subcodes.first_line: O Mírzá Háshim! Rejoice thou, inasmuch as the Supreme Pen hath made mention of thee from the Most Glorious Horizon, and hath sent down for thee that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا میرزا هاشم افرح بما ذکرک القلم الاعلی فی المنظر الابهی و انزل لک ما
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
